question.content: For the steam-injected gas-turbine cycle with the given operating data, compute the thermal efficiency under reversible compression/expansion and air-like gas-property assumptions. Output exactly one decimal number with 4 decimal places, plain ASCII only, no Chinese characters, no percent sign, no fraction, no equation form, and no extra text. Answer format: a decimal number rounded to four decimal places; write only the numerical value itself, with no units, explanatory text, or equals sign.

step_1.content: Compute cycle net work and heat input using the provided thermodynamic property relations.
step_1.key_point: Compute cycle net work and heat input using the provided thermodynamic property relations.

step_3.content: Analyze panel 1 of 2 and record the intermediate relation needed before moving to the next panel.
step_3.key_point: Set up thermal-efficiency relation under reversible compression and expansion.

step_5.content: Evaluate efficiency as eta = W_net / Q_in and format as a decimal fraction.
